---
title: "Home"
---

---
title: "Kirsten Phang - Work for Computational Statistics at Colgate Univeristy"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kphang-lang?tab=repositories
---

I made this website to compile all of the lab work I have done for my computational statistics course this semester. Labs 1-11 are laid out in this website to show skills I have learned in R and statistics more broadly. 

## Education

Colgate Univeristy | August 2024 - present

Mathematical Economics Major, Political Science Minor
